payload.answer: Sam left Goldman last month and joined Point72; he still listens to Bill Evans but lately more early Coltrane; he is open to catching up about AI infrastructure and wants Daniele to send an article.
citations: Daniele: Still at Goldman? Sam: No, I left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Daniele: Still listening to Bill Evans? Sam: Yes, but lately more early Coltrane.
Daniele: We should catch up about AI infra. Sam: Definitely, send me that article.

entity_resolution.reason: No prior entity context provided for resolution.

memory_cards.statement: Sam said he left Goldman last month and joined Point72.
Sam said he still listens to Bill Evans, but lately more early Coltrane.
Sam agreed to catch up about AI infrastructure and asked Daniele to send an article.
